name: Walnut Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast walnuts: Spread in a single layer in a 9-inch glass pie plate. Stirring every 2 minutes, microwave on high for 6 minutes or until toasted.
2. Melt butter: Place in a 2 quart glass measure. Microwave on high for 1 minute.
3. Blend melted butter with brown sugar and sweetened condensed milk. Stirring every 2 minutes, microwave on high for 8 to 9 minutes or until mixture reaches a medium caramel color.
4. Stir in vanilla and beat with a wooden spoon for 2 to 3 minutes.
5. Fold in toasted walnuts.
6. Pour into a buttered 8-inch square dish.
7. Cool to lukewarm; then refrigerate until set.
8. Cut into squares. Makes 36 pieces.
